title: Database Connector Options
text: Database Connector Options Most Uniface database connectors have optional parameters, known as connector options. Connector options usually set database-specific parameters; some connector options are available on many database connectors. Connector options are set in the [DRIVER_SETTINGS] section of the application assignment file, using the following syntax: USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS Option1 { , Option2 , ... , OptionN } For more information, see [DRIVER_SETTINGS] . For example. [DRIVER_SETTINGS] ORA = U6.1 USYS$ORA_PARAMS = open cursors 40, dpa Copy Common Connector Options Connector options that are common to several database connectors are listed as subtopics.
